title: FY FIBER HOUSE Flannel Fleece Leopard Print Throw Blanket, Super Soft Lightweight Fluffy Throw for Couch, 150X200cm, Pink
features: LUXURIOUS QUALITY: Made of high grade 100% ultra-soft microfiber polyester, this plush blanket is super soft, durable, and lightweight. It's wrinkle and fade resistant, anti-pilling, and is suitable for all seasons.

SIZES AND COLORS: Available in throw/single,twin/double,queen and king sizes. Throw/single size measures 130x150cm, twin/double size measures 150x200cm, queen size measures 230x230cm, king size measures 270x230cm. The elegant color is leopard print with a little gradient.

DIFFERENCE IN 3D HAND FEELING: This is the highest quality and technology for Super Comfortable plush throw blanket for sleeping, when you touch it, it bring you a different 3D concave and convex feel, and gives you warmth with light weight and soft feeling.
EASY CARE: Wash separately in cold water,tumble dry low.Our blanket gets softer with each wash!
SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: If you are not satisfied with this, for whatever reason, we’ll take care of you with a full refund or exchange.
description: From the brand FY FIBER HOUSE A wizard for life Previous page Since 2017, FY Fibre House has brought the magic of sincerity, warmth and comfort to any home. Our brand is not only about blankets, but also about textiles such as pillowcases, curtains and pet beds. Each of our products has been specially developed for the demanding US and EU markets and embodies the essence of home comfort. FY Fibre House - Each product invites you to enjoy time together comfortably High Quality Blankets High quality cushion covers More great products Next page
